articles.title: Karnataka: HC extends stay on FIR against MLA, election officials till June 3
articles.description: The Bengaluru High Court has extended a stay on an FIR concerning the Sringeri vote recount. The case involves BJP MLA DN Jeevaraj and election officials KN Ramesh and Vedamurthy. The FIR was filed following a complaint about alleged electoral malpractice. The court's decision provides temporary relief to the accused. The Congress party plans to challenge the revised election results.

articles.title: UP Police arrest 10 in 7 encounters across Muzaffarnagar in 24 hours, 9 shot in legs
articles.description: Uttar Pradesh Police arrested 10 accused during seven separate encounters across Muzaffarnagar within 24 hours. Officials said nine of the accused sustained bullet injuries to their legs during exchanges of fire with police teams.

articles.title: Quote of the Day by Marcus Aurelius: ‘Never let the future disturb you; you will meet it, if you...’ - Why worrying too much about the future steals peace from the present, explained by the Stoic philosopher
articles.description: Marcus Aurelius Quote of the Day suggests that fear of the future often creates more suffering than the actual challenges themselves. In his famous words from Meditations, the Stoic philosopher reminds people that the same reason, strength, and resilience helping them survive todays struggles will also help them face tomorrows uncertainties. It encourages people to stop overthinking the future and focus on facing the present.

Understanding these core numbers can guide you in navigating love, identifying values, and managing conflicts effectively with potential partners.
